overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a grassy ridge overlooking a vast valley with a river. The character traverses a dirt path through rolling hills under a clear blue sky, with a brief moment where he adjusts his hat.

events.description: birds fly overhead across the sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the ridge path overlooking the valley below

entered.detail: winding dirt trail along the hilltop
green grassy slope descending to the valley
expansive valley view with rolling terrain and distant forest
waterway visible in the valley below
hazy mountain range on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy ridge trail with an expansive valley overlook. The dirt path winds along the hilltop with green slopes descending to the left, while distant mountains frame the horizon under a clear blue sky.

events.description: character raises hand to adjust hat while walking

agents.ego_description: continuing along the ridge trail, briefly adjusting hat with right hand

entered.detail: green grassy slope rising to the right of the path
clusters of shrubs along the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the dirt trail through rolling grasslands. The valley view shifts to the left as the path curves, and the character briefly adjusts their hat. Grassy hillsides flank both sides of the trail with scattered bushes appearing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hill path with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the grassy hills

entered.detail: isolated trees dotting the grassy landscape

segments.scene_description: The final section shows the character walking along the trail through undulating grassy hills with scattered trees. The valley and distant mountains are no longer visible as the path continues through the open grassland under the clear sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding ridge trail that transitions from an expansive valley overlook into an enclosed landscape of rolling grasslands. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path on a hilltop, where green slopes descend toward a vast valley framed by distant mountains under a clear blue sky. As the path curves, the valley view shifts to the left and the character briefly adjusts their hat while scattered bushes begin to appear along the trail. The scene then shifts further into the undulating hills, where the horizon and distant mountains gradually disappear from view. Finally, the camera continues forward through open grasslands dotted with scattered trees under the persistent clear sky.
